findings.description: Header text is duplicated and the page footer is misplaced.
findings.evidence: In the HTML, the right-aligned header text (names and titles) appears twice. The page footer text and colored bar are incorrectly placed near the top of the page, between the duplicated headers and above the 'MEMORANDUM' title.

findings.description: Page footer appears at the top of the content area.
findings.evidence: The HTML rendering places the footer text and colored bar at the very top of the page, preceding the main 'I. History/Background' section content.
The headings 'I. History/Background' and 'II. March 10, 2016...' are bold in the PDF but rendered as standard weight text in the HTML.

findings.description: Page footer interrupts the reading flow of a bulleted list.
findings.evidence: The footer text and colored bar are incorrectly injected in the middle of a list, appearing directly between the 'Environmental' and 'Health Issues' bullet points.
The heading 'III. Written Public Comment Summary' is bold in the PDF but rendered as standard weight text in the HTML.

findings.description: Page footer interrupts the reading flow of a bulleted list.
findings.evidence: The footer text and colored bar are incorrectly injected in the middle of a list, appearing directly between the 'Criticism' and 'Dam Safety' bullet points.
The heading 'IV. Attachments' is bold in the PDF but rendered as standard weight text in the HTML.
